SEARCH
Package edu.bu.pas.risk.training.data

Class ReplayBuffer<ACTION_TYPE>

java.lang.Object
edu.bu.pas.risk.training.data.ReplayBuffer<ACTION_TYPE>
public class ReplayBuffer<ACTION_TYPE> extends Object

Represents a replay buffer for training a q-function backed via a neural network. A replay buffer is a in-memory cache which stores observed transitions from playing the game. When it is time to do some gradient descent to update the neural network a batch (of predetermined size) is randomly sampled from this fixed-sized buffer and then converted into a supervised learning dataset with which we can evaluate gradients.

Since this is a fixed-sized buffer, when it becomes full and new samples need to be added this buffer chooses do evict some of its existing transitions to make space. How that happens is controlled via an eviction policy set by the the ReplacementType enum.

Author:
Andrew Wood
